_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.PDF.Activities ReadPDFText activity faults at runtime with UiPath.PDF.PdfException 'Invalid input stream' because the input file is corrupt / not a valid PDF (the Digitizer reader rejects the byte stream). Signature taken verbatim from UiPath.PDF source (PDFReader re-throw of 'Invalid input stream'); workflow name neutralized. The agent must read the corrupt/unreadable-PDF signature, not blame a missing file, encryption, OCR, or workflow logic. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the PdfException 'Invalid input stream' signature from the Info / Error log.
